subject: New Request: Software Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the healthcare sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Software Engineer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• Java
• AWS
• Docker Compose
• Cassandra

Details:
Client: MediLink
Start: ASAP
Duration: 3 months
Location: Stockholm (remote)
Rate: up to 900 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Lena Eriksson
Business Director
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 73 345 67 89
